title: Cantros 7
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Cantros 7 |region=[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} |sector=[[Saijo sector/Legends|Saijo sector]] |system=[[Cantros system/Legends|Cantros system]] |coordinates=J-20 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial[[Star Wars (1977) 93|''Star Wars'' (1977) 93]] |diameter= |atmosphere=[[Atmosphere/Legends#Type I atmospheres|Type I]] {{C|breathable}} |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species=[[Cantrosian]]s |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities=[[Capital of Cantros 7]] |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Minka and I are from the capital of Cantros Seven. How about you?"
"I'll bet we were neighbors once…it's a big town.|Sami and a Cantrosian Rebel|}} '''Cantros 7''', or simply '''Cantros''',{{CSWECite|II|317|Minka}} was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Cantros system/Legends|Cantros system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]' [[Saijo sector/Legends|Saijo sector]]. ==History== The world was inhabited by a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Cantrosian|felinoids]], many of whom joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Rebels [[Minka]] and [[Sami (Cantrosian)|Sami]] were [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] in the [[capital of Cantros 7]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 93|''Star Wars'' (1977) 93]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 93}} {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/nagai11202009/index.html|text=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs|int=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Arboreal planets]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Saijo sector locations]] [[Category:Type I atmosphere planets]]
